element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core weapon throughout; teaches reload management
Primary defensive move against enemy fire

element_introduction_order.element: Civilian NPCs (must not harm; 3 kills = stage restart)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Risk management constraint in combat scenarios
First weapon upgrade; introduces ammo scarcity
Ranged explosive tool for crowd control
Ultimate close-range weapon; forces pistol sacrifice

element_introduction_order.element: Stage-specific objectives (must fulfill before reaching goal)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core level design constraint; adds puzzle element to action

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate action intensity; frantic but never unbearable; relieved by variety of weapons and secret areas; repetitive structure mitigated by environmental and objective changes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret areas exist and serve as relief from main action rhythm

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to core mechanics (pistol, dodge roll, civilian constraint) in controlled Chateau and Mall environments
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon variety expansion and increased environmental complexity (Park, Subway, Dock); introduces grenade and mine mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminating weapon (flamethrower) in hostile environments (Chinese City, Oil Refinery, Highway, Office Building); sustained action pressure
notable_spikes: Stage 4 (Subway) - introduction of grenades in confined space
Stage 6 (Chinese City) - flamethrower acquisition forces pistol sacrifice, resource management shift

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 9 stages requires completion of particular series of goals before reaching stage goal; creates structured flow within action gameplay
New weapon introduced roughly every 1-2 stages, paired with thematic environment (Uzi in Mall, grenades in Subway, mines at Dock, flamethrower in Chinese City)
Presence of non-hostile NPCs that must be avoided; kills tracked per-stage with restart penalty at 3 kills; creates secondary risk management layer
Nine distinct settings (Chateau, Mall, Park, Subway, Dock, Chinese City, Oil Refinery, Overseas Highway, Office Building) prevent environmental monotony

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - True Lies (SNES)
